[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up cartoon-style yellow smiley face fills most of the image above partial headline text and small green objects on a white background.

Main Subject:
The main visual focus is a large circular yellow face with black arched eyes, a big open mouth showing white teeth, and a small blue droplet shape over the right side of the face; the mouth area is outlined with orange and pink tones.

Setting:
The background is plain and light-colored, resembling a simple graphic or screenshot layout, with no clear real-world setting; lighting is uniform and flat like digital artwork.

Visual Details:
The composition is tightly cropped around the cartoon face. Behind and around the face, there are hints of green shapes at the edges. Across the lower portion, there is bold black text on white. Several small green oval shapes are scattered near the bottom, and a tiny yellow and green graphic element appears on the right side of the text area.

Visible Text:
Ikut yang lagi viral

Practical Summary:
The image shows a cartoon yellow face with a blue droplet and an open smiling mouth. Part of a headline reading “Ikut yang lagi viral” appears below the graphic, with small green objects scattered near the bottom.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

Ikut yang lagi viral

# Structured Version

- **Ikut yang lagi viral**

# Notes

- The image contains additional emoji/graphics, but only the text above is clearly readable.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
